---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new or an improvement to an existing feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like?

Describe the feature in plain English. "I want the screener to show me the next earnings date for each stock" is great. No need for technical detail at this stage.

## Why would this be useful?

What problem does it solve? Who else might benefit?

## What does it look like today (without this feature)?

## Any ideas on how it could work?

This is optional — share rough ideas if you have them, or leave it blank.

## Anything else?

Screenshots, examples from other tools you like, or just more context.
